title: Instrument d'accession de l'Irlande

pages.text:
• IRELAND

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

to the

AGREEMENT

concerning the

INTERNATIONAL INSTITUTE

OF REFRIGERATION

Done at Paris the Ist December 1954

-

IRELAND

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

to the

AGREEMENT

concerning the

INTERNATIONAL INSTITUTE

OF REFRIGERATION

Done at Paris the Ist December 1954

WHEREAS an Agreement concerning the International Institute of Refrigeration, replacing the Convention of 21st June 1920 as modified on 31st May 1937, was done at Paris on the

Ist December 1954;

AND WHEREAS the aforesaid Agreement may be acceded to in accordance with Article 3, C thereof by countries which are not parties thereto;

NOW THEREFORE the Government of Ireland, having considered and approved the Agreement concerning the International

Institute of Refrigeration, do hereby formally accede thereto.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF

I, Froinsias Mac Aogáin, Minister for

External Affairs of Ireland, have signed this Instrument of

Accession and have affixed thereto the Seal of my Office.

Persias Mas dogan.

Minister for External Affairs.

DUBLIN, this 7tk day of October 1964.

(6176).J.1470. Wt.1610-X.33600.11/60.1.T.&Co,Ltd (Spl.)
